name: S. Khonkaen Foods Public Company Limited
summary: S. Khonkaen Foods Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes processed food products in Thailand and internationally. The company operates through four segments: Production Food from Pork, Processed Seafood, Restaurants, and Swine Farm. It offers processed seafood, such as fish balls and rolls, shrimp and squid balls, etc.; fried fish and shrimp balls, deep fried fish paste, fish tofu, fried fish rolls, etc.; spicy sauces, chilli paste, etc.; ready-to-eat products; and frozen seafoods, including squid, hard clams, shrimps, fishes, etc. under the Taechiew, Kwangchow, Kaoloon, Shanghai, Hong Kong, Taipei, Mahachai, Kaizen, and Odeng brands. The company also provides Thai native foods under the S. Khonkaen, Moo Dee, Huay Kaew, Ban Phai, Moo Champ, and sethi brands; pork and chicken snack products, which include pork crispy and caps under the Entre√É¬©; frozen foods under the Yunnan brand; and papaya salad and roasted chicken under the Zaap Classic brand. In addition, it is involved in breeding and selling of finishing swine; food and beverage distribution; and restaurant and franchise businesses, as well as offers training and seminar services. As of December 31, 2020, it operated 13 quick service restaurants. S. Khonkaen Foods Public Company Limited was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
